Summary: S1-001 Create Engineering Coding Standards Context Document
Description: Story ID: S1-001\nOutcome: Team publishes a context doc for AI and humans covering naming conventions, folder structure, linting/formatting rules, error handling style, and API response conventions.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006, S1-BR-008

Summary: S1-002 Create UI/UX Standards Context Document
Description: Story ID: S1-002\nOutcome: Team publishes a context doc defining chosen navigation model, dashboard interaction model, component usage rules, spacing/typography conventions, and consistency rules.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006, S1-BR-008

Summary: S1-003 Create Data and Security Guardrails Context Document
Description: Story ID: S1-003\nOutcome: Team publishes a context doc defining per-user data ownership, authorization checks, protected route behavior, and prohibited cross-user access patterns.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006, S1-BR-008

Summary: S1-004 Create AI Prompting and Review Context Document
Description: Story ID: S1-004\nOutcome: Team publishes a context doc for how AI-generated code is prompted, reviewed, tested, and approved before merge.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006, S1-BR-008

Summary: S1-005 Initialize Monorepo/Project Structure
Description: Story ID: S1-005\nOutcome: Repo has stable frontend/backend structure, shared config, and documented run commands.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-006 Configure Linting and Formatting
Description: Story ID: S1-006\nOutcome: Lint/format tools are installed and runnable in CI; formatting is consistent across team contributions.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-007 Configure Unit Test Frameworks
Description: Story ID: S1-007\nOutcome: Unit test frameworks are set up for frontend and backend with one passing sample test per side.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-008 Configure CI Pipeline for Build and Test
Description: Story ID: S1-008\nOutcome: Pull requests run automated build and unit tests; failing checks block merge.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-009 Configure Environment Management
Description: Story ID: S1-009\nOutcome: Team has documented .env strategy for local/dev/prod without committing secrets.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-010 Implement User Self-Registration
Description: Story ID: S1-010\nOutcome: New users can create accounts through a registration form with validation and duplicate-email handling.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-003, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-011 Implement User Login and Session Handling
Description: Story ID: S1-011\nOutcome: Registered users can sign in and maintain authenticated session state.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-005

Summary: S1-012 Implement Logout and Session Invalidation
Description: Story ID: S1-012\nOutcome: Users can sign out cleanly and protected data becomes inaccessible until next login.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-005

Summary: S1-013 Implement Password Reset Workflow
Description: Story ID: S1-013\nOutcome: Users can request reset and set a new password through secure token flow.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-004, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-014 Enforce Route Protection
Description: Story ID: S1-014\nOutcome: Unauthenticated users are redirected from protected pages and APIs return correct auth errors.\nRules: S1-BR-001, S1-BR-002

Summary: S1-015 Enforce Per-User Data Authorization
Description: Story ID: S1-015\nOutcome: API/resource access is constrained to owner account; cross-user reads/writes are blocked.\nRules: S1-BR-006, S1-BR-007, S1-BR-008

Summary: S1-016 Build Global App Shell and Navigation
Description: Story ID: S1-016\nOutcome: App has consistent navigation and page layout for the Sprint 1 areas: Dashboard, Profile, and Settings, with a structure that can be extended in later sprints.\nRules: S1-BR-012

Summary: S1-017 Implement Settings Page Baseline
Description: Story ID: S1-017\nOutcome: Settings page exists with baseline account settings structure and consistent app-shell behavior.\nRules: S1-BR-012

Summary: S1-018 Build Dashboard Home Skeleton
Description: Story ID: S1-018\nOutcome: Dashboard home page renders stable structure for job board workspace.\nRules: S1-BR-012

Summary: S1-019 Implement Basic Job Entity and Storage
Description: Story ID: S1-019\nOutcome: Job records can be created, stored, and retrieved with user ownership.\nRules: S1-BR-012, S1-BR-013, S1-BR-006

Summary: S1-020 Implement Basic Job Card Rendering
Description: Story ID: S1-020\nOutcome: Dashboard shows job cards with baseline fields (title, company, stage, activity date).\nRules: S1-BR-012, S1-BR-014

Summary: S1-021 Implement Basic Job Create/Edit Form
Description: Story ID: S1-021\nOutcome: Users can create and update job records from dashboard flow.\nRules: S1-BR-012, S1-BR-013

Summary: S1-022 Implement Profile Baseline (Identity + Summary)
Description: Story ID: S1-022\nOutcome: Users can create/update identity/contact fields and summary with persistence.\nRules: S1-BR-009, S1-BR-010

Summary: S1-023 Implement Profile Baseline Completion Indicator
Description: Story ID: S1-023\nOutcome: Profile page shows completion status for baseline fields and updates after save.\nRules: S1-BR-009, S1-BR-011
